raw_text: I would like to rate minus 0, minus 100 etc, as I was waiting for long time whatever I order, and they cancelled the order from their side. if this app made for ease whatever their advertise say, then should not cancel like such

I ordered 2items from the app. One item was completely fine & delivered in proper condition but the second item arrived with a broken seal and visible teeth marks on the cover/cap. Because of hygiene and safety concerns I had to throw it away. This kind of packaging issue should be checked properly before delivery. Very disappointing experience. After this experience I am uninstalling the app and I don’t think I will order from it again. I would also not recommend others to order from this app.

easy to use and app is good but only the thing is if you need something urgently you have to unnecessarily add items upto 159 or more to get free delivery whether store is quite near to my location so they should work on it if it is not very far order upto 100 should be at free delivery.

Fabulous concept real time saver in crunch situations. Unlike Zomato Swiggy the vegetables and groceries were not that expensive as compared to by hand shopping. I had a very good experience except one incident in gurugram where nothing happened till almost 2 hours of order , Finally I had to cancel the order The refund process was smooth but this gave me a feeling we can't depend on it.

Blinkit is so easy to use but sometimes if u cancel u can't put on cash delivery only if u pay with card for 10to20 times then u can put cash on again and it has almost everything in it i really love the app but if u buy vegetables in the evening or night it bad only in the morning the vegetables is good I recommend this app for you 😊

I ordered one item knee warmer. The size is not feet I want to replace but, they do not allow me to replace very bad experience on Amazon they can contact the seller and we can talk and replace items. It's not about return it just replacement it should have this Open available if size it not feet. Size is something you can not predict on online platform. So, thay should open for replacement if size issue. My money wasted and The item is also useless for me. I want XXL and this item size is L.

I had placed an order by making online payment, then I was not stopped from placing the order by saying out of service, but after order confirmation and online payment, I get a call from Blinkit and it is said that your order is out of service, we are cancelling your order and my cancellation charges will be deducted and their way of talking was useless.

For the past few months I have experienced a lot of hustle. previously I haven't got my refund, which item I have returned within an hour. today I ordered a few vegetables and packaging and the quality of those items are very poor. Few are rotted, and few are packed with bad and cheap quality products. So for the past few months I have been suffering with daily order. Now I am thinking of switching to another platform to change the experience. VERY DISAPPOINTING EXPERIENCE.

everything is fine but practically 2 things are not up to Mark, 1st one is despite the blinkit store very close to my location like within 500 meters, an additional 8 rupees handling fee is applied every time. 2nd thing is after 12 midnight when craving for food happens the blinkit store is closed up to 6 am. 3rd thing is i need to purchase anything for 175 for applying for free delivery previously it was 100 rupees approx . it's increasing day by day. there are many apps

I had a really frustrating experience with Blinkit because it always seems to be on high demand. Whenever I try to place an order, the app either shows “no delivery partners available” or keeps increasing the delivery time again and again. Even when I manage to place an order, it often gets delayed or canceled at the last moment, which is really inconvenient, especially when I need things urgently. The constant high demand makes the service unreliable, and it feels like you can’t depend on it.

work on the solution for a confirmation on what you are packing and what customer has ordered.a nd every time your refund does not give a Solution. eg what if someone orders in between cooking, some ingredients and your orders also received wrong. also work on the, solution for those area delivery which are far away from their stores.. because you always show high demand and I found the delivery is always poor, wrong orderwhat is the meaning of waiting so long Even you not delivering the right.

There 8s no option to have a conversation with an expert directly and there is no customer care support. one of the worst experience. i m trying to talk to their executive from last 30 mins. yet i m unable to. One of the worst delivery app

I love it BUT you literally let chicken sellers to sell rotten products. please , please take some actions on it. and I'll revert my rating to 5 star as apart from this and having curdled milk. it's great and I loved using it. but the chicken experience just , arm twisted my experience.

It was good when I started using the app but now it's kind of like scamming people. I ordered some things and it was showing to be delivered in about 8 minutes, after 16 minutes it's still showing arriving in 8 minutes.

I've been using Blinkit long enough to say that it's definitely a trustworthy company with an impressive variety of products. I never faced any issues with the delivery service or the delivery partners. I also never had any missed item from my purchases. They've improved the quality of vegetables and fruits overtime as well (fresher and in better condition). I highly recommend!

Your service is veryyy cheapp the delivery guy didn't wait for the assurance from us it was a parcel to someone else there was a clear misunderstanding but we told to wait we were reaching to the blinkit guy but he left without telling us ruining the suprise of mine and also the refund didn't come and app is showing that it is arrived properly veryy baddd recommendationn poorrr jobbb

my first order, took me almost an hour to order one single order, app was glitching, restarting again and again and again and again and again and again and again and again and again. worst ordering experience of my life across all e-commerce platforms. Do better, even 1 star ⭐ feels like a big giveaway from me to you... pathetic service quality of your app..

yesterday night I order smart watch and that too open box delivery but your delivery partner get delay 30 min and I'm okay with that delay but because of that i dont have time to open that box so i just received that parcel without opening it and just give otp to him. but when I reach home and open it I found it that i received empty box of watch. I was even complaining from that time but my issue is not getting solve so tell me what to do even so many complains there no response

pros- good variety of items..though Zepto is welk catching up. cons- prices of items are higher than that in other similar apps. And for God's sake, please remove that handling fees. if I am ordering something it is expected to be taken care of while delivering, why an extra charge? Be somewhat creative in charging extra..

this apps is very useful and convenient but there is one major problem its electronics are not very good it doesn't even have school project things like sort of bulb holders or mini motors and the electronics are not of very good quality 😕 hear me out you have to do some quite working on your electronic system trust me then it will be much better
